rows.name: Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger
rows.note: Keychron confirmed a July 22 Kickstarter for the V6 Ultra HE hybrid-switch board as VIP reservations close July 21; Hall effect keeps consolidating as the default gaming-board expectation.

rows.name: Keychron
rows.note: Orca Echo crowdfunding hit a GIZMART-record pace in its first five days and stays open through Aug 31; V6 Ultra HE hybrid board locks a July 22 Kickstarter date.

rows.name: Split / Ergo
rows.note: Keychron x GIZMART's Orca Echo split-plus-trackball campaign is the platform's biggest crowdfunding record this cycle, keeping split layouts in front-page discussion.

rows.name: HMX Cloud V2
rows.note: No new review or restock catalyst this week; still broadly in stock, attention easing toward baseline as the switch settles into its mid-tier benchmark slot.

rows.name: Work Louder x OpenAI Codex Micro
rows.note: One week out from the planned July 15 launch, OpenAI's first branded hardware keeps drawing outside-press coverage though pricing is still unannounced.

rows.name: Mode Designs
rows.note: Encore 2026 is confirmed to ship late July once Sonnet fulfillment wraps; Prologue 98% locks an 8-point crown mount with preorders eyed for late summer.

rows.name: 75% Layout
rows.note: Steady evergreen interest continues; no new 75% board launch this week to move the needle either way.

rows.name: Alice layout
rows.note: Slow bleed continues as ergo-curious buyers pivot toward true split boards; Orca Echo's record-setting campaign compounds the pull.

rows.name: Gateron Oil King
rows.note: Oil King switch sets remain backordered across several major storefronts this week, with only a waitlist notify option live.

rows.name: Gateron Lanes
rows.note: Prior review-cycle attention keeps fading toward steady state; still readily stocked with no fresh catalyst this week.

rows.name: GMK CYL Masterpiece R2
rows.note: Further post-close fade two weeks out from the June 26 close; Q4 2026-to-Q1 2027 production estimates are now the only open thread.

rows.name: GMK CYL Pandemonium
rows.note: Post-close fade continues five days after the scheduled July 1 close; no production update yet to re-engage community discussion.

rows.name: DCS Dolch
rows.note: Post-close fade deepens five days after the July 1 Divinikey close; the October 2026 ship estimate remains the only news.

rows.name: Prototypist
rows.note: Quiet week between group buys; the Paper 65 and teased Smurve80/Kafka/VS06 kits keep the pipeline visible but no dated launch news surfaced this week.

rows.name: Wuque Studio
rows.note: Mammoth V2 and Promise V2 remain listed as in-development; no dated announcement this week, slow bleed continues.

rows.name: Cherry MX2A
rows.note: Continued slow bleed as Keychron's July 22 V6 Ultra HE hybrid-switch Kickstarter date reinforces the market's magnetic/HE pivot away from MX2A.

rows.name: Cherry (GMK parent)
rows.note: GMK's Masterpiece R2, Pandemonium, and Dolch production backlog keeps the parent brand present but passive amid the ongoing HE-driven MX2A slide.
